states.errorDescription: We couldn't load this. Please try again.

brand.promiseShort: From speech to medical record and claim form — no typing.

hero.title: Finish the visit with your note and claim form
hero.subtitle: Prontus.ai listens to the visit and returns a structured medical record and a completed TISS form in seconds. Less typing, fewer denials, more time with the patient.
hero.trust: LGPD compliant · Encrypted health data · Human-in-the-loop

stats.noteTime: to a finished note after the visit

features.title: Everything that comes after “Good morning, doctor”
features.subtitle: From audio capture to claim submission. The full cycle, closed — not just transcription.

live.title: Live encounter
live.desc: Audio captured with a live transcript, building the clinical note in real time, section by section.

note.title: Structured medical record
note.desc: Chief complaint, HPI, exam, assessment, and plan — organized, with everything inferred from audio clearly highlighted.

tiss.title: Pre-filled TISS form
tiss.desc: Procedures, CIDs, and codes ready to go, with validation of the fields that most often trigger denials.

gloss.title: Pre-denial check
gloss.desc: The agent reviews the form before submission and flags whatever would lead the payer to deny it.

copilot.title: Copilot on every screen
copilot.desc: Ask “what's my denial rate this month?” or “generate the form for this visit.” It understands the whole system.

whatsapp.title: Control via WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: “Bring me this week's denied claims.” The AI pulls the data, replies, and acts — with confirmation.

record.title: Record
record.desc: Start the visit with the patient's consent. Prontus listens.

structure.title: Structure
structure.desc: The AI transcribes and builds the medical record section by section, in real time.

review.title: Review
review.desc: You check and adjust. Nothing becomes a claim form without your approval.

submit.title: Submit
submit.desc: Generate the validated TISS form and submit it to the payer — or export it.

security.title: Health data is sensitive. We treat it that way.
security.subtitle: Explicit consent, end-to-end encryption, an immutable audit trail, and mandatory human-in-the-loop.

lgpd.title: LGPD, GDPR, and PIPL
lgpd.desc: Consent, data minimization, and the right to erasure, by region.

crypto.title: Encryption
crypto.desc: In transit and at rest; secrets in a vault, never in code.

audit.title: Immutable audit
audit.desc: Who did what, when, and the outcome — including AI actions.

hitl.title: Human-in-the-loop
hitl.desc: The doctor approves the note before any claim form is generated.

pricing.title: Per doctor, per month. Cancel anytime.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Payer billing is a market module (Brazil).

testimonials.title: Doctors getting back what they miss most: time.

q1.a: Only with the patient's consent, encrypted, and with configurable retention. You can purge it at any time.

q2.q: Does the AI submit the claim form on its own?
q2.a: No. Human-in-the-loop is mandatory: the note and the form only move forward after your approval.

q3.q: Does it work for my specialty?
q3.a: Yes. There are editable note templates by specialty, and the clinical vocabulary adapts.

q4.q: What about integration with my electronic medical record?
q4.a: We connect to PEPs and payers via integrations. TISS is a market module (Brazil).

q5.q: Is it available in other languages?
q5.a: Yes — pt-BR, English, Chinese, and French from day one.

cta.title: Get hours back in your day.
cta.subtitle: Try Prontus.ai on a single visit. No card required.

auth.signInSubtitle: Pick up right where you left off.
auth.demoNote: Demo: click sign in to access the sample clinic.

today.title: Today
today.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No visits today} one {# visit today} other {# visits today}}
today.emptyDesc: When you have visits scheduled, they'll show up here.
today.agentNudge: The agent suggests starting with the {count} visits that have a pending claim form.

encounter.title: Live encounter

consent.title: Patient consent
consent.body: Let the patient know the visit will be recorded and transcribed by Prontus.ai to generate the medical record. The audio is encrypted and can be purged at any time.
consent.checkbox: The patient has consented to recording

encounter.micPermission: We need microphone access to capture the visit.
encounter.micDenied: Microphone blocked. Allow access in your browser to record.
encounter.transcriptEmpty: The transcript appears here as the conversation unfolds.
encounter.noteBuilding: The note builds in real time as the visit progresses.

review.title: Note review
review.subtitle: Review the generated medical record and adjust anything you need. Nothing becomes a claim form without your approval.

tiss.title: TISS form
tiss.subtitle: Form pre-filled from the visit. Review the fields before submitting.
tiss.validationDesc: {count, plural, =0 {No issues found} one {# issue that commonly causes denials} other {# issues that commonly cause denials}}
tiss.confirmSubmitBody: The form will be transmitted in the TISS standard. Confirm the procedures and CIDs before proceeding.

fields.missingCid: Add at least one matching CID

billing.title: Billing & denials
billing.subtitle: Track claim forms submitted, paid, and denied — and why.
billing.agentRecover: The agent prioritized {count} denied claims for resubmission.

templates.title: Note templates
templates.subtitle: Templates by specialty — editable and versioned by language.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect your electronic medical record, payers, and the audio engine.

consent.retentionDesc: How long encrypted audio is kept before it's automatically purged.

copilot.name: Mari
copilot.title: Mari · Clinical copilot
copilot.subtitle: Understands the whole system. Ask a question or request an action.
copilot.placeholder: Ask or request something… e.g., “what's my denial rate this month?”
copilot.poweredBy: Governed AI · respects your role and LGPD

today: Which visits are missing a medical record?
How many minutes did I save this week?
review: Summarize this medical record in 3 lines
Is anything missing from the differentials?
Generate the TISS form for this visit
billing: Which claims were denied and why?
What's my denial rate this month?

copilot.greeting: Hi! I'm Mari, your copilot. I can summarize medical records, generate TISS forms, explain your denials, and more. What do you need?

agent.title: Autonomous agent
agent.subtitle: Monitors, recommends, and acts within your authority limits.
agent.noRecommendations: No pending recommendations. Everything's under control.

preGloss.title: Fix form before submission
preGloss.desc: {patient}'s form has a code that doesn't match the CID — high denial risk.

resubmit.title: Resubmit denied form
resubmit.desc: {patient}'s form was denied for missing authorization. I've attached the document — ready to resubmit.

incomplete.title: Visit without a finalized medical record
incomplete.desc: {patient}'s visit is still a draft. Want to finalize the note now?

whatsapp.title: Control via WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Your AI with a name and a number. “Bring me this,” “do that” — it pulls the data and acts in the system.
examples: Bring me this week's denied claims
Resubmit patient Marina's form? Reply YES
How many minutes did I save today?
whatsapp.consent: Channel consent and opt-out at any time.

owner.title: Owner console
owner.subtitle: Full SaaS management — tenants, plans, landing page, AI, and system health.

plans.title: Plans & pricing
plans.subtitle: Set price, cycle, limits, and which modules each plan unlocks.

landing.title: Landing page editor
landing.subtitle: Edit the landing page's sections, plans, and copy across all 4 languages. Publish with preview.
landing.savedNote: Changes appear on the landing page once published.

flags.title: Feature flags & modules
flags.subtitle: Turn tabs and features on or off by plan, by tenant, or globally.

ai.title: AI & agent
ai.subtitle: Configure the AI Core per tenant: persona, model, limits, and agent automation.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Provision a number and persona per platform and per tenant; enable commands by plan.

access.title: Access & roles
access.subtitle: Define roles and the permission matrix. One source for UI, API, AI, and WhatsApp.

audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: An immutable trail of everything — including impersonation and AI actions.

landing.title: Prontus.ai — Finish the visit with your note and claim form ready
landing.description: From the consultation audio to a structured medical record and a filled TISS claim — no typing. Fewer denials, more time with patients.

app.title: Prontus.ai
app.description: Structured medical records and TISS claims from the consultation audio.
